---
title: "Projects"
description: "A collection of data science projects in R, statistics, and visualization."
toc: false
---

Below are selected projects. Each links to a full write-up with code, methodology, and results.

---

## Statistical Modeling

### Project Title One
**Tools:** R, tidymodels, ggplot2  
**Summary:** Describe the problem, your approach, and the result in 3–4 sentences. What was interesting or challenging about this dataset? What did you learn?

[Read write-up →](posts/project-one.qmd)

---

## Data Visualization

### Project Title Two
**Tools:** R, ggplot2, Shiny (or Quarto dashboards)  
**Summary:** What were you trying to communicate visually? What design decisions did you make and why?

[Read write-up →](posts/project-two.qmd)

---

## Add More Projects

Copy any block above and fill in your own details. Each project can link to:

- A `.qmd` file in the `posts/` folder (full write-up with code)
- An external URL (GitHub repo, Shiny app, etc.)
- A rendered dashboard

> **Tip:** The best portfolio projects show your *thinking*, not just your code. Include a section on what you tried that didn't work.
